notes: Seed historical example: FDA-approved secondary prevention of cardiovascular events (antiplatelet).
Seed historical example: FDA-approved anticoagulation for stroke prevention in atrial fibrillation.
Seed historical example: FDA-approved lipid-lowering for coronary artery disease.
Seed historical example: FDA-approved first-line therapy for type 2 diabetes.
Seed historical example: classic repurposing success -- thalidomide repositioned from antiemetic to multiple myeloma (FDA 2006).
Seed historical example: classic repurposing success -- sildenafil repositioned from erectile dysfunction to PAH (FDA 2005 Revatio).
Seed historical example: mifepristone repositioned from pregnancy termination to Cushing syndrome (FDA 2012 Korlym).
Seed historical example: topiramate repositioned from epilepsy to migraine prophylaxis (FDA 2014).
Seed historical example: rofecoxib (Vioxx) withdrawn due to increased cardiovascular events -- TOXIC signal.
Seed historical example: cisapride withdrawn due to QT prolongation and fatal arrhythmias -- TOXIC signal.
Seed historical example: troglitazone (Rezulin) withdrawn due to hepatotoxicity -- TOXIC signal.
Seed historical example: cerivastatin (Baycol) withdrawn due to rhabdomyolysis -- TOXIC signal.
Seed historical example: terfenadine (Seldane) withdrawn due to fatal QT prolongation via CYP3A4 interaction -- TOXIC signal.
